event: Portrait of a St. Bernard dog
description: A portrait of a large St. Bernard dog shown in profile facing right, its mouth slightly open and tongue visible. The dog has a brown and white coat with distinctive markings — a brown patch over one ear and eye, white muzzle and chest. It wears a dark collar. The background is a cloudy grey sky. The painting is displayed in an ornate gilt frame. The rendering is detailed and naturalistic, capturing the texture of the dog's fur and its alert, good-natured expression.
